title: USB C to Lightning Cable 1M 2Pack[ Apple MFi Certified ], iPhone Fast Charger Cable USB C for iPhone 14 13 12 11 Pro Max XS XR 8 Plus/iPad, Braided 1M Type C to Lightning Cable iPhone Charging Cable
features: 【Apple MFi Certified Premium Quality】 Our lightning cable is officially Apple MFi certified with an authentic Apple C94 terminal chip, ensuring 100% compatibility and safety with all your Lightning devices. This iPhone charger cable eliminates the "accessory not supported" warning message that plagues generic cables, providing reliable connection every time you plug in. The USB C to lightning cable supports ultra-fast data transfer speeds up to 480Mbp. Say goodbye to compatibility issues and enjoy seamless performance with our certified apple lightning cable that delivers professional-grade reliability for both home and office use.

【Military-Grade Durability & Extra Long Design】 Experience unmatched durability with our military-grade long iPhone charger cable featuring a reinforced aluminum alloy connector that withstands over 35,000+ bend tests - 75% more than standard cables. The premium double-braided nylon exterior of this extra long iPhone charger cable resists fraying, tangling, and daily wear, making it perfect for families, travelers, and heavy users who demand reliability. Our iPhone charging cable liberates you from outlet restrictions, allowing you to charge comfortably on the couch, work freely at your desk, use your device in bed, or even charge from the backseat of your car during road trips.

【Power Delivery Fast Charging Technology】 Equipped with advanced PD 3.0 technology, our iPhone fast charger cable automatically identifies your device and adjusts the optimal current output to prevent overcharging, overheating, and short-circuiting, protecting your valuable device's battery health. This USB C lightning cable utilizes premium copper cores for maximum conductivity and minimal power loss during charging sessions. The usbc to lightning cable also features trickle charging mode that automatically activates when your battery reaches 80%, extending overall battery lifespan and maintaining optimal performance for years to come.

【Universal Compatibility & Multi-Device Support】 Our versatile USB C to lightning cable works flawlessly with the entire iPhone ecosystem and beyond. Specifically designed for iPhone 14/14 Plus/14 Pro/14 Pro Max, iPhone 13/13 Mini/13 Pro/13 Pro Max, iPhone 12/12 Mini/12 Pro/12 Pro Max, iPhone 11/11 Pro/11 Pro Max, iPhone XS/XS Max/XR/X, iPhone 8/8 Plus, iPhone 7/7 Plus, iPhone 6/6S/6 Plus, iPhone SE (2nd/3rd Gen), iPad , AirPods Pro, AirPods with charging case, and all devices with Lightning ports.

【Complete Package & Worry-Free Purchase】 What you receive: a value 2-pack 1M USB C to lightning cable configuration designed to meet every charging scenario.We stand behind our product quality with 1 year warranty and 24/7 customer support - if you encounter any issues with your iPhone charger lightning cable, simply contact us for immediate replacement or full refund, no questions asked. Our dedicated support team responds within 24 hours to ensure your complete satisfaction.
